Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.1442

Title: Extends the effectiveness of authorizing big game hunting in Albany county
Summary: Extends provisions authorizing big game hunting in Albany county until October 1, 2028.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 141 of the laws of 2014 amending the environmental conservation law relating to authorizing the hunting of big game in the county of Albany with rifles, in relation to the effectiveness thereof
